HERO IMAGES
===========

Drop your two hero images in THIS folder (the project's /public folder):

  hero-desktop.jpg   -> shown on screens 768px wide and up (wide / landscape crop)
  hero-mobile.jpg    -> shown on phones (tall / portrait crop)

They are referenced as "/hero-desktop.jpg" and "/hero-mobile.jpg" in
src/components/Hero.jsx. The headline text sits on top of the image with a
dark gradient scrim for readability — no text is baked into the image.

Until you add them, the hero shows a crimson gradient fallback automatically.

You can use .jpg, .png or .webp — if you use a different extension, update the
two file names in src/components/Hero.jsx to match.
